name: Atmos™ Rewards Visa Signature® Business Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Limited-time online offer: 70,000 bonus points plus a $99 Companion Fare (plus taxes and fees from $23) after qualifying spend.
notes: Official Bank of America business page confirmed 70,000 bonus points + $99 Companion Fare on 2026-07-05.

earning_rates.notes: On Alaska Airlines tickets, vacation packages, and cargo purchases
Gas, local transit including rideshare, and shipping
Local transit including rideshare and shipping

other_benefits.name: Companion Fare
other_benefits.description: Coach Companion Fare from $121 each account anniversary after $6,000+ spend prior anniversary year

other_benefits.name: Free First Checked Bag
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free when card is used to buy the tickets

other_benefits.name: Priority Boarding
other_benefits.description: Priority boarding when paying with card

other_benefits.name: Alaska Lounge+ Discount
other_benefits.description: $100 discount off an annual Alaska Lounge+ Membership

other_benefits.name: 10% Rewards Bonus
other_benefits.description: 10% rewards bonus on all miles earned with eligible Bank of America business account

sources.notes: Official Bank of America business Atmos Rewards page.
